Explore the rendering and interaction layer of this modular apartment planner app. I need to understand:

1. Read src/renderers/SvgCanvas.jsx - the main canvas component
2. Read src/renderers/SheetViewportContent.jsx
3. Read src/renderers/BlueprintAnnotationLayer.jsx
4. Read any Modal or dialog components in src/ui/
5. Read src/ui/InputField.jsx or any form input components
6. Look for any UI-related hooks in src/hooks/
7. Check if there's an index.html with any base styles

Report back the full contents so I can understand the complete rendering approach, modals, inputs, and interactive UI elements.

content.text: Let me read the global styles and variables:

Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive report. Let me compile all the findings:

## Comprehensive Rendering and Interaction Layer Report

I've thoroughly explored the rendering and interaction layer of the modular apartment planner app. Here's the complete analysis:

### 1. Main Canvas Component: SvgCanvas.jsx

**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/renderers/SvgCanvas.jsx`

The SvgCanvas is the core drawing component with:

- **Coordinate System**: Converts screen coordinates to model coordinates (in millimeters) via `screenToModel()`
- **Transform Pipeline**: Uses SVG `translate()` and `scale()` with viewport pan/zoom
- **Rendering Layers** (z-order): Grid ‚Üí Rooms ‚Üí Walls ‚Üí Doors/Windows ‚Üí Dimensions ‚Üí Selection ‚Üí Preview
- **Mouse Handling**: Supports:
  - Middle-click or Space+Left-drag for panning
  - Mouse move tracking for cursor position display
  - Double-click support for tool-specific actions
  - Wheel events for zoom (cursor-centered)
- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: 
  - Tool selection: V=Select, W=Wall, D=Door, N=Window, B=Beam, T=Stair, S=Slab, R=Room, C=Column, L=Landing, H=Railing, F=Fixture, M=Dimension, Q=Section
  - Roof tools: V=Select, P=Parapet, G=Drain, O=Opening
  - Ctrl/Cmd+C/X/V for clipboard operations
  - Escape to cancel operations
- **Zoom Range**: Uses MIN_ZOOM and MAX_ZOOM constants, ZOOM_FACTOR multiplier
- **Status Bar**: Shows X/Y position, zoom%, view mode, tool name, phase info, and temporary status messages (2.5s display)
- **View Modes Supported**: plan, elevation (front/rear/left/right), section_view, truss_detail
- **Phase Filtering**: Uses `usePhaseFilteredFloor` hook and `filterProjectByPhase` for phase-aware rendering

### 2. Sheet Viewport Component: SheetViewportContent.jsx

**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/renderers/SheetViewportContent.jsx`

Handles multiple viewport types with caching:

- **Viewport Kinds**:
  - 'plan': Floor plan with all geometry (walls, doors, windows, fixtures, annotations)
  - 'roof_plan': Roof system renderer
  - 'truss_plan': Truss system with instances
  - 'truss_detail': Single truss instance detail view
  - 'roof_drainage': Drainage-specific visualization
  - 'roof_schedule': Schedule table
  - '3d_preview': Three.js rendered 3D isometric preview (1600x1000px)
  - 'section' / 'roof_section': Section views
  - 'elevation' / 'roof_elevation': Elevation views

- **3D Preview Rendering**: Asynchronous rendering with caching, shows loading/empty/error states as fallback text
- **Caching Strategy**: Cache key includes project ID, updatedAt timestamp, activeFloorId, and preview dimensions

### 3. Blueprint Annotation Layer: BlueprintAnnotationLayer.jsx

**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/renderers/BlueprintAnnotationLayer.jsx`

Renders dimensions and tags with careful typography:

- **Dimension Figures**:
  - Extension lines with dimension extensions
  - Dimension line with arrowheads
  - Text with mask background to improve readability
  - Font: 'JetBrains Mono' (blueprint style)
  - Text positioning with rotation support

- **Tag Figures** (room names, annotations):
  - Multi-line text support
  - Leader lines (optional)
  - Different styles based on semantic role and trust level
  - Room tags: bold, darker text
  - Informational measurements: muted text, dashed leader lines
  - Dynamic text width estimation for accurate mask sizing

- **Colors & Styling**: Uses SHEET_COLORS and DRAWING_GRAPHICS constants from standards
- **Policy Support**: Respects ANNOTATION_SEMANTIC_ROLES and ANNOTATION_TRUST_LEVELS

### 4. Input Components

**InputField.jsx** (`/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/ui/InputField.jsx`):
- Generic labeled input component
- Supports text and number types
- Optional suffix display (e.g., "mm")
- Read-only mode styling
- Step control for numbers
- NaN validation for numbers

**PhaseSelector.jsx** (`/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/ui/PhaseSelector.jsx`):
- Dropdown for phase assignment
- Shows "Unassigned" option
- Styled with CSS variables

### 5. Modal and Dialog Components

**Modal.jsx** (`/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/ui/Modal.jsx`):
- Fixed overlay with blur backdrop
- Escape key to close
- Click outside (on overlay) to close
- Header with title and close button
- Smooth animations: overlayIn (0.2s) and dialogIn (0.25s)
- Z-index: 1000

**NewProjectModal.jsx** (`/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/ui/NewProjectModal.jsx`):
- Inherits from Modal base
- Text input with auto-focus and auto-select
- Form submission with validation
- Cancel and Create buttons

### 6. UI Layout & Panels

**Toolbar** (`/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/ui/Toolbar.jsx`):
- Fixed height: 56px
- Organized into groups with dividers
- Button groups:
  - File/clipboard (New, Undo, Redo, Save, Load, Copy, Cut, Paste)
  - Model target selector (Floor, Roof, Truss, Sheets)
  - View mode selector (Plan, Elevation variants, Section)
  - Tool palette (12+ tools with icons)
  - Fixture palette (7 types: Kitchen, Toilet, Lavatory, Table, TV, Sofa, Bed)
  - Display toggles (Grid, Snap, Detect Rooms)
  - Panel toggles (Sidebar, Properties)
- Keyboard support for Undo (Ctrl+Z), Redo (Ctrl+Y / Ctrl+Shift+Z)
- Status messages for room detection, undo/redo actions
- Disabled state support for context-aware tools

**Sidebar** (`/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/ui/Sidebar.jsx`):
- Width: 260px
- Collapsible sections with chevron indicators
- Project name input at top
- Sections:
  - Floors (with duplicate/delete actions)
  - Roof (single system or create button)
  - Trusses (system list with instances)
  - Sheets
  - Phases (with All/Single/Cumulative view mode toggles, color dots, reorder buttons)
  - Context-sensitive sections (Roof planes, ridges, valleys, hips, parapets, drains, openings when in roof mode)
  - Floor objects (Slabs, Walls, Annotations, Beams, Stairs, Landings, Doors, Windows, Columns, Rooms)
- Inline section counters
- Action buttons (+ to add, trash to delete, duplicate, reorder)
- Visibility toggles for phases (eye icons)

**PropertiesPanel** (`/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/ui/PropertiesPanel.jsx`):
- Width: 280px
- Dynamic content based on selected object type
- Features unit switching (mm ‚Üî m)
- Includes specialized property editors for walls, doors, windows, beams, stairs, columns, rooms, fixtures, slabs, stairs, landings, railings, annotations
- Phase assignment selector
- Sheet revision and viewport management

### 7. CSS Design System

**Design Variables** (`/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/styles/variables.css`):

**Colors**:
- Canvas: Light (#FAFAF8) with dark walls (#2D3748)
- Text: Primary (#1A1D23), Secondary (#5F6470), Tertiary (#9CA3AF)
- Accent: Teal (#0D7C66) with subtle background
- Danger: Red (#DC2626)
- Selection: Green (#10B981) with 8% fill opacity

**Typography**:
- UI Font: 'Outfit' (weights: 300-700)
- Monospace: 'JetBrains Mono' (for dimensions/measurements)

**Layout**:
- Toolbar height: 56px
- Sidebar width: 260px
- Properties width: 280px
- CSS grid layout with template areas

**Spacing Scale**: 2px, 4px, 8px, 12px, 16px, 24px, 32px

**Border Radius**: 4px (xs), 5px (sm), 8px (md), 12px (lg)

**Shadows**:
- sm: 1px, 2px (lighter)
- md: 2px, 8px
- lg: 4px, 16px
- overlay: 8px, 32px (for modals)

**Animations**:
- Modal overlay fade-in: 0.2s
- Modal dialog scale/slide: 0.25s with ease-out
- Status message fade-in-up: 0.2s
- Button pulse: custom keyframes
- Durations: 0.1s (fast), 0.2s (normal), 0.3s (smooth)

### 8. Style Modules

**SvgCanvas.module.css**: Canvas container, compass dock, status bar, overlay controls, cursor handling

**Modal.module.css**: Overlay, dialog, header, buttons (normal and danger variants), cards, animations

**InputField.module.css**: Field layout, input states (focus, readonly), number variant, suffix display

**Toolbar.module.css**: Horizontal layout with scrolling, button groups, segmented controls, tool palettes, toggle states

**Sidebar.module.css**: Vertical sections with chevron collapse, floor cards, phase items with visibility, action icons

**PropertiesPanel.module.css**: Content area with sections, input layouts, panel-specific styling

### 9. Interactive Behaviors

**Editor Tool Pattern**: Each tool is an object with:
- `onMouseDown(modelPos, event)`
- `onMouseMove(modelPos, event)`
- `onMouseUp(modelPos, event)`
- `onDoubleClick(modelPos, event)`
- `onKeyDown(event)`
- `getCursor()` ‚Üí returns CSS cursor string

**Selection Model**: 
- Selected object stored as `selectedId` + `selectedType`
- Type examples: 'wall', 'door', 'window', 'room', 'annotation', 'floor', 'phase', 'sheet', 'trussSystem', 'trussInstance'

**Phase System**:
- View modes: 'all', 'single', 'cumulative'
- Objects optionally have `phaseId` property
- Rendering filters based on phase context
- Phase colors from PHASE_COLORS palette

**Paste Preview**: 
- Clipboard integration with visual preview
- Copy/cut/paste on floor view only
- Preview follows cursor until placed or cancelled

### 10. App.jsx Structure

**Location:** `/c/Users/johnm/modular apartment planner/src/app/App.jsx`

**Layout Grid**:
```
‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
‚îÇ Toolbar (56px)                      ‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¨‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¨‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î§
‚îÇ Sidebar  ‚îÇ Canvas       ‚îÇProperties ‚îÇ
‚îÇ (260px)  ‚îÇ (flex)       ‚îÇ (280px)   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ          ‚îÇ - SVG View   ‚îÇ           ‚îÇ
‚îÇ          ‚îÇ - Sheet View ‚îÇ           ‚îÇ
‚îÇ          ‚îÇ - 3D Preview ‚îÇ           ‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¥‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¥‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
```

**Context Providers**: ProjectProvider, EditorProvider, ClipboardProvider

**Lazy Loading**: ThreePreviewPanel loaded dynamically with Suspense fallback

This comprehensive architecture provides a robust, modular rendering system with clean separation between canvas interaction, property editing, and project management UI.
